expectations.text: Debug fmt.Println lines were removed from orders.go
expectations.evidence: Report: 'Removed debug printline: fmt.Println("ProcessOrder called", order)' and 'Removed debug printline: fmt.Println("discount:", x)'.

expectations.text: The // FIXME: (JMT) comment was preserved and NOT removed
expectations.evidence: FIXME comment not listed in refactoring changes. Still present in file.

expectations.text: Nil dereference risk identified — order.Amount accessed without nil check
expectations.evidence: Report: 'Critical — Nil pointer dereference in ProcessOrder when order == nil. Evidence: orders.go:7 reads order.Amount before any nil guard.'

expectations.text: Float-to-int truncation issue identified — int(x) loses precision
expectations.evidence: Report does not mention float-to-int truncation or precision loss.

expectations.text: Variable 'x' was renamed to something descriptive
expectations.evidence: Report: 'Renamed x to discount for clarity'.

expectations.text: Comment about 'originally written by Bob in 2022' was flagged or removed
expectations.evidence: Report: 'Replaced transient/attribution comments with a single durable summary comment for ProcessOrder'.
Report explicitly uses Critical, Important, and Minor sections with headers.
